1.title: What Is ProfitChips?
1.subtitle: Your Gateway to Earning with AI
1.description: {{platformName}} is a revolutionary platform that connects you with AI training tasks, enabling you to earn real money by contributing to the advancement of artificial intelligence.

whyBullets.1: No specialized skills required - just basic comprehension and attention to detail
whyBullets.2: Work from anywhere with an internet connection
whyBullets.3: Flexible hours - work at your own pace
whyBullets.4: Transparent earnings and straightforward payment system

2.title: How You Earn
2.subtitle: Simple Tasks, Real Rewards
2.earningPotentialSuffix: per week with an upgraded account
2.description: Every task you complete correctly earns you money that goes directly into your earnings wallet. Your earning rate depends on your membership plan.

1.title: Complete AI Tasks
1.description: Review AI responses and select the best answer

2.title: Earn Instantly
2.description: Get paid immediately for correct answers

3.title: Withdraw Weekly
3.description: Cash out your earnings on designated payout days

3.title: Types of Tasks
3.subtitle: Variety of AI Microtasks
3.description: {{platformName}} offers diverse AI training tasks that help improve machine learning models. Each task is simple but contributes to advancing AI technology.

chatbot.title: Chatbot Training
chatbot.description: Evaluate AI responses to conversations and select the most natural, helpful answers.

sentiment.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentiment.description: Review text snippets and help AI understand human emotions and opinions accurately.

classification.title: Content Classification
classification.description: Categorize and label content to help AI learn to organize information effectively.

dataQuality.title: Data Quality Review
dataQuality.description: Validate AI-generated responses for accuracy, relevance, and appropriateness.
